name: Whisk
summary: Whisk is an image remixing experiment that allows users to combine subject, scene, and style from existing images through drag-and-drop interaction.
whyItMatters: Whisk replaces complex text prompting with visual composition. It demonstrates a new paradigm for creative AI where users communicate intent visually instead of verbally.
likelyEvolution: May evolve into a mainstream creative tool or be integrated into image generation products.
